questions.question: Paul compares the Christian life to what three roles?
questions.feedback: Paul uses the metaphors of soldier, athlete, and farmer to describe faithful service.

questions.question: Paul tells Timothy to be a worker who does not need to be ashamed, correctly handling what?
questions.feedback: Be a worker who correctly handles the word of truth.

questions.question: Paul says if we are faithless, God remains faithful because he cannot deny himself.
questions.feedback: Even if we are faithless, God remains faithful — he cannot deny himself.

questions.question: Paul says to flee youthful _____ and pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace.
questions.feedback: Flee youthful passions and pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace.

questions.question: Paul says the Lord's servant must not be quarrelsome but _____ to everyone.
questions.feedback: The Lord's servant must be kind to everyone, able to teach, patiently enduring evil.
